hooks.command: uv --directory "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" run memory-mcp-event append --quiet --root "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.memory-mcp" --adapter codex --event-type user_prompt
uv --directory "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" run memory-mcp-event append --quiet --root "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.memory-mcp" --adapter codex --event-type tool_result
uv --directory "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" run memory-mcp-event append --quiet --root "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.memory-mcp" --adapter codex --event-type turn_stop
